tagline.da: Smag noget du selv har dyrket!

theme.hero_task: First pea shoot harvest for a snack

tasks.action: Harvest first pea shoots from Bed B for a snack

prompt.en: Snip the top 5cm with scissors -- taste it right there in the garden!
prompt.da: Klip de oeverste 5cm med en saks -- smag den lige der i haven!

prompt.en: Check each bed with your finger first -- only water the dry ones!
prompt.da: Tjek hvert bed med din finger foerst -- vand kun de toerre!

tasks.action: Guide pea tendrils onto trellis in Bed A

prompt.en: Gently wrap the curly tendril around the wire -- it will grab on by itself!
prompt.da: Vikl forsigtigt snoetraaden rundt om traaden -- den griber selv fat!

tasks.action: Re-apply Ferramol slug pellets around both beds

prompt.en: Scatter fresh Ferramol pellets around both bed bases -- previous application may have dissolved.
prompt.da: Gaa rundt om alle bede og tjek kobbertapen -- udskift loese stykker.

growth_events.event: Pea shoots ready for first cutting at 10-15cm tall

prompt.en: The pea shoots are tall enough to eat! Snip and taste -- do they taste sweet?
prompt.da: Aerteskuddene er hoeje nok til at spise! Klip og smag -- smager de soedt?

growth_events.event: First lettuce seedlings showing tiny leaves

prompt.en: Can you see the baby lettuce leaves? They're so small right now!
prompt.da: Kan du se de smaa salatblade? De er saa smaa lige nu!

sowing_tasks.action: Sow second succession lettuce in Bed A
